channel.title: nRF52 on Home Smart Mesh
channel.description: Recent content in nRF52 on Home Smart Mesh

item.title: Simple Mesh SensorTag
item.description: Networks / Simple Mesh Frameworks / Raspi IoT concept # board render repo directory nRF52832 BME280 MAX44009 Schematics # Full Screen function setup_svg_panzoom(){ let params = { panEnabled: true, zoomEnabled: true, dblClickZoomEnabled: true, controlIconsEnabled: false, mouseWheelZoomEnabled: true, preventMouseEventsDefault: true, zoomScaleSensitivity: 0.

item.title: Thread SensorTag
item.description: Networks / Thread Frameworks / CHIP v1.0 MS8607 VEML6030 # The Thread sensorTag is based on an nRF52840 on a MS88SF2 module. The used sensors are VEMLS6030 for light and MS8607 for Temperature, Humidity and Pressure. commit nRF52840 MS88SF2 MS86072 VEML6030 Schematics # Full Screen function setup_svg_panzoom(){ let params = { panEnabled: true, zoomEnabled: true, dblClickZoomEnabled: true, controlIconsEnabled: false, mouseWheelZoomEnabled: true, preventMouseEventsDefault: true, zoomScaleSensitivity: 0.

item.title: nRF52840 USB dongle
item.description: Product Page nRF52840 ARM M4 64 MHz 1024 KB ROM - 256 KB RAM Bluetooth 5, Mesh 802.15.4, Thread, Zigbee USB 2 GetStarted) Applications # custom mesh coordinator nRF52840 Dongle # Pinout # Serial Wire Debug # LEDS # LED1 Green : P0.06 LED2 Green : P0.08 LED2 Green : P1.
